title: polygala vulgaris f. multicaulis
intro: Polygala vulgaris f. multicaulis, also known as Common Milkwort, is a perennial herbaceous plant in the family Polygalaceae. It is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, as well as its ability to support the immune system and promote cardiovascular health. The health benefits of Common Milkwort include reducing inflammation, improving respiratory function, and supporting the body's natural defenses against infections. Common Milkwort is commonly prepared as a tea, tincture, or dried herb for use in herbal remedies, with some preparations also available as capsules or tablets.
